analysisNotes: The Google Ads account is effectively inactive: all 15 campaigns are either PAUSED or REMOVED with zero spend, impressions, and conversions over the reporting period. Only 'RSC | Brand | Search' is ENABLED but has generated no impressions. Shopify shows zero orders and zero revenue over the last 4 days, and GA4 shows only 37 total sessions (mostly direct) with zero conversions. The site receives modest organic traffic from GSC (avg ~22 impressions/day) concentrated on blog content around coconut oil, non-toxic lotion, and natural toothpaste topics.
